technicalSEO.title: Custom Table tents - Custom Printed Tent Cards | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Table tents are a versatile marketing tool that can be used to promote your business. Learn more about table tent printing and how tent cards can help you promote your brand and attract customers.

Custom Table Tents for Restaurant & Business Marketing

High-Quality Printed Table Tent Cards with Custom Design & Fast Production

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options for Table Tents Finish Selection (Matte or Gloss) Production Time Selection Upload Your Table Tent Artwork Quantity Selection PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Table Tents for Restaurant & Event Marketing

Create professional table tent cards that showcase your menu specials, promotions, and business messaging directly at customer tables. Our custom table tents are digitally printed on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, ensuring durability for high-traffic restaurant and business environments.

Available in three convenient sizes to fit any table setting: 4.25" x 6.00", 5.00" x 5.00", and 7.00" x 5.00". Choose from matte or gloss finishes to match your brand aesthetic and create eye-catching displays that drive sales and customer engagement.

Perfect for restaurants, cafes, hotels, trade shows, and retail locations where you need to communicate important information directly to customers at point-of-service locations.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Table Tent Material & Paper Options for Durable Indoor Use

Our table tent cards are printed on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, specifically selected for restaurant and business environments. This heavyweight paper provides excellent durability while maintaining a professional appearance that withstands frequent handling.

Paper Specifications:

  • Weight: 13.4 pt coverstock for optimal stability
  • Finish Options: Matte or gloss coating available
  • Fold Design: Pre-scored for easy setup and professional presentation
  • Indoor Use: Optimized for restaurant, retail, and office environments

The coverstock material ensures your table tents maintain their shape and professional appearance even with regular customer interaction and table service activities.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Table Tent Cards

Choose the perfect finish for your table tent cards based on your brand presentation and lighting environment.

Matte Finish:

  • Elegant, non-reflective surface
  • Reduces glare under restaurant lighting
  • Easy to read from multiple angles
  • Premium, sophisticated appearance
  • Ideal for fine dining and upscale establishments

Gloss Finish:

  • Vibrant color reproduction
  • Enhanced image sharpness and contrast
  • Eye-catching, reflective surface
  • Easy to clean and maintain
  • Perfect for colorful menu items and promotions

Both finishing options include pre-scoring for easy folding and professional setup on any table surface.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Table Tent Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes designed to meet your restaurant and business scheduling needs. All production times begin once artwork is approved and payment is processed.

1 Business Day Priority Production:

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent promotions
  • Same-day rush available in select cases
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Ideal for last-minute menu changes and special events

2 Business Days Express Production:

  • Quick turnaround with additional quality review time
  • Perfect balance of speed and precision
  • Emergency rush options available

3 Business Days Standard Production:

  • Most popular production option
  • Comprehensive quality control process
  • Excellent value for planned campaigns

5 Business Days Saver Production:

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Full design review and optimization included
  • Perfect for seasonal menu updates

Note: Total delivery time includes both production and shipping timeframes. Contact customer service for same-day rush availability.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Table Tent Payment & Ordering Options

Secure payment processing with multiple convenient options for restaurants and businesses of any size.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received before production begins
  • Secure Processing: Payment charged only after order approval

Payment Process:

  1. Review your table tent design and specifications
  2. Approve artwork and production details
  3. Payment processed automatically
  4. Production begins immediately

All table tent orders require payment before production to ensure fastest possible turnaround times. Your credit card information is securely processed and never charged until you approve your final order.

For check payments and volume pricing, contact customer service for processing details and business account options.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Table Tent Delivery

Fast, reliable delivery options to get your table tents to your restaurant or business location quickly and safely.

Standard Shipping Methods:

  • UPS Ground (3-5 Business Days): Cost-effective standard delivery
  • Three Day Select: Guaranteed 3 business day delivery
  • Two Day Express: Fast delivery for urgent orders
  • Next Day Air: Overnight delivery when you need it immediately
  • UPS Next Day Air AM: Morning delivery for critical timing

Shipping Guidelines:

  • 90% of the United States receives 1-3 day ground delivery
  • Tracking number provided once shipped
  • Pricing based on package weight and destination
  • Large quantity orders may incur additional shipping charges

Package Protection:

  • Damaged items replaced after return of damaged goods
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirmation (7-10 business days)
  • International shipping available with customer-provided documentation

Contact customer service at (320) 965-9300 for shipping questions or special delivery requirements.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Restaurant & Business Uses for Printed Table Tents

Table tent cards serve as powerful point-of-service marketing tools that capture customer attention exactly when purchasing decisions are made.

Restaurant Applications:

  • Daily Specials: Highlight chef recommendations and seasonal offerings
  • Drink Promotions: Showcase cocktails, wine pairings, and beverage specials
  • Dessert Menus: Increase dessert sales with appealing visual displays
  • Happy Hour Promotions: Drive traffic during specific time periods
  • Catering Services: Promote additional revenue streams

Business & Retail Uses:

  • Service Promotions: Highlight special offers and packages
  • Product Information: Educate customers about features and benefits
  • Event Announcements: Promote upcoming sales and special events
  • Contact Information: Display phone numbers, websites, and social media
  • Safety Guidelines: Communicate important policies and procedures

Trade Show & Events:

  • Booth information displays
  • Product specification sheets
  • Contact information and lead generation
  • Special show pricing and offers
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Table Tent Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Ensure your table tent cards print with exceptional quality by following our artwork specifications and design guidelines.

Preferred File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-Resolution Raster: .pdf or .jpg files at 300 DPI minimum
  • Professional Design: Our graphic designers available for file optimization

Design Specifications:

  • Resolution: 300 DPI for sharp, clear printing
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 0.25" from fold lines

Color Matching Options:

  • Standard Color: Digital printing with excellent color accuracy
  • Color Match Proof System: Available for color-critical projects
  • Brand Consistency: Contact customer service for specific color matching

Design Services Available:

  • File format conversion and optimization
  • Resolution enhancement for low-quality images
  • Professional design consultation
  • Artwork troubleshooting and corrections

Unsure about your file quality? Our professional graphic design team will review your artwork and provide recommendations for optimal printing results.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Table Tents Today

Transform your restaurant tables and business displays with professional table tent cards that drive sales and enhance customer experience. With premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, choice of matte or gloss finishes, and production times as fast as 1 business day, you can quickly implement new promotions and marketing campaigns.

Start by selecting your preferred size from our three standard options, choose your finish, and upload your artwork. Our professional printing process ensures vibrant colors and sharp text that captures customer attention and communicates your message effectively.

Ready to create table tents that increase sales and improve customer engagement? Use our easy online configurator to customize your order, upload your design, and select your production timeline. Professional graphic design assistance is available if you need help optimizing your artwork for printing.

Questions about sizing, artwork requirements, or bulk pricing? Contact our customer service team at (320) 965-9300 for personalized assistance with your table tent project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Table Tent Printing

What sizes are available for custom table tents?

We offer three standard table tent sizes to fit different table settings and display needs: 4.25" x 6.00" (compact vertical format), 5.00" x 5.00" (square format), and 7.00" x 5.00" (horizontal landscape format). All sizes are printed on 13.4 pt coverstock and include pre-scoring for easy setup.

What's the difference between matte and gloss table tent finishes?

Matte finish provides an elegant, non-reflective surface that reduces glare under restaurant lighting and offers easy readability from multiple angles. Gloss finish delivers vibrant color reproduction with enhanced image sharpness and an eye-catching reflective surface that's easy to clean. Choose based on your lighting environment and brand aesthetic preferences.

How thick are your table tent cards?

Our table tent cards are printed on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, providing excellent stability and durability for restaurant and business environments. This weight ensures your table tents maintain their shape and professional appearance even with frequent customer interaction and table service activities.

How do I design professional table tent cards?

For best results, provide vector-based files (.eps or .ai) with fonts converted to outlines, or high-resolution .pdf/.jpg files at 300 DPI. Include 0.125" bleed on all sides and keep important text 0.25" from fold lines. Our professional graphic design team is available to help optimize your artwork or create designs from scratch.

How are table tents typically used in restaurants and businesses?

Table tents serve as powerful point-of-service marketing tools for promoting daily specials, drink promotions, dessert menus, and catering services in restaurants. Businesses use them for service promotions, product information, event announcements, and contact details. They're also effective for trade show displays and special event marketing.
